pattern: Only the rows of the chosen square window swap top-for-bottom; everything outside the window stays untouched.
hints: The window occupies rows x..x+k-1 and columns y..y+k-1; nothing else changes.
Vertical flip means row x pairs with row x+k-1, row x+1 with x+k-2, and so on.
Swap those paired rows but only over the k columns starting at y, leaving the rest of each row as-is.

edge_inputs.description: window offset from origin leaves surrounding cells fixed

stress.description: random grid with a random in-bounds square window
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    m = rng.randint(1, 50)
    ncols = rng.randint(1, 50)
    grid = [[rng.randint(1, 100) for _ in range(ncols)] for _ in range(m)]
    x = rng.randint(0, m - 1)
    y = rng.randint(0, ncols - 1)
    k = rng.randint(1, min(m - x, ncols - y))
    return [grid, x, y, k]
stress.note: k respects the min(m-x, n-y) bound
